instruction: Your department sends its copying to the photocopy center of your company. The center bills your department \$ 0.11 per page. You have investigated the possibility of buying a departmental copier for \$ 3800. With your own copier, the cost per page would be \$ 0.04. The expected life of the copier is 6 years. You figure that you must make at least [ANS] copies per year to justify buying the copier. Your answer should be a natural number. (Of course this question totally ignores the convenience of having your own copier. Also, the number of copies is likely to go up, and so may the price charged by the copy center.) Hint: Set up and solve an inequality.
